summary: Local Save/Load upgraded to backup envelope format with metadata and snapshot payload.
Restore path now validates envelope/snapshot/legacy local payload before applySnapshot.
Restore now preserves backup UI state via keepUI:false and auto-saves pre-restore backup to localStorage.
App init now constrains local load input to JSON and clears the file input after restore attempts.
notes: This build was validated with static syntax checks and a Node VM smoke test for backup envelope validation/restore flow.
Browser click-through QA was not executed in this environment.
